class.name: SpineSlider
class.brief_description: A slider constraint for animating properties.
class.description: A slider constraint that can be used to animate various properties of bones. Sliders provide a way to control and animate bone transformations through constraint values.

method.name: update
method.description: Updates the slider constraint. The physics parameter determines how physics are applied. See [enum SpineConstant.Physics].

method.name: get_data
method.description: Returns the data for this slider constraint.

method.name: get_bone
method.description: Returns the bone affected by this slider.

method.name: set_bone
method.description: Sets the bone affected by this slider.

method.name: get_pose
method.description: Returns the current pose for this slider.

method.name: get_applied_pose
method.description: Returns the applied pose for this slider.

method.name: is_active
method.description: Returns whether this slider is active.

method.name: set_active
method.description: Sets whether this slider is active.
